newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. Siasun launched a new AI-enabled humanoid series in 2025 and remains one of China's largest industrial/mobile robotics makers, but there is no fresh fundamental development in the window.

verdicts.rankRationale: No new fundamental evidence since June 9 (AUTOMATE 2026 attendance only). The thesis - China robotics scale read-through rather than a single humanoid product - is unchanged; +5.6% move is noise. Hold.
verdicts.bull: Largest Chinese robotics maker (CAS-backed); broad industrial/mobile automation scale ride on China robotics buildout.
verdicts.neutral: Diversified automation play, not a pure humanoid proof-point; no fresh catalyst.
verdicts.bear: Limited direct humanoid leverage; industrial robotics margins/competition pressure.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: China robotics capex and any humanoid program disclosure.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Thin humanoid pure-play exposure; domestic competition.
